The bearing represents the angle to the goal relative to my current facing direction. A positive bearing means the goal is to my right. A bearing of 0 means the goal is directly ahead. A bearing of 180 means directly behind.

Currently, bearing is +81 degrees. This means the goal is 81 degrees to my right. I need to turn right to reduce this angle towards 0.
